message:
feat(demo_showcase): implement live log viewer with follow mode (bd-mwty)

Add LogsPage with real-time log viewing capabilities:
- Viewport-based scrollable content using bubbles viewport
- Follow mode (tail -f) that pins to latest entries
- Auto-pause when user scrolls up, resume with 'f' or 'G'
- Status bar showing FOLLOWING/PAUSED state, level counts, position
- Color-coded log levels via LogFormatter from bd-32pp
- Key bindings: j/k scroll, f follow, g/G top/bottom, r refresh
- Deterministic log generation correlated with services/jobs

Integrates with existing theme system for consistent styling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
